overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game showing a female protagonist walking with her small alien companion across a grassy frontier landscape toward a weathered sci-fi outpost. The scene features a bright sunny day on an alien planet with a large ringed celestial body visible in the sky, floating satellite dishes emitting pink beams, and ends with the character approaching Imperial officers at the building entrance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass toward a distant sci-fi settlement with her small companion creature

notable_agents.action: small merqaal companion creature trotting alongside the protagonist

entered.detail: large satellite dish floating in sky emitting pink energy beam toward the ground
distinctive sharp rock formation rising in the distant background
weathered industrial building with curved roof and satellite dishes
tall thin vertical structure with antenna arrays

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks through an open grassland under a bright blue sky with a large ringed planet visible. A floating communication array hovers in the distance emitting a pink beam, while a jagged mountain peak and frontier outpost building sit on the horizon. The small companion creature follows closely as they traverse the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to outpost building with rock formations

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the outpost building grows larger in view, passing rock outcroppings on the right

notable_agents.action: companion creature keeping pace with the protagonist

entered.detail: large reddish rock formation beside the path
stacked rectangular cargo containers near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The path leads closer to the main outpost building, with the floating communication array now positioned prominently to the right. Large rock outcroppings line the right side of the trail while supply crates become visible near the building entrance. The vegetation thins as the built environment dominates the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: outpost entrance with Imperial military presence

events.description: character slows walking pace and comes to a stop at the building entrance
Imperial officers become visible standing guard near the entrance

agents.ego_description: slowing to a halt as she reaches the outpost entrance where Imperial personnel are standing guard

notable_agents.action: Imperial officer in green uniform standing with hands on hips near the entrance
stormtrooper in white armor standing guard near the building wall

entered.detail: human officer wearing green Imperial uniform and cap
soldier in white armor standing near the building

segments.scene_description: The protagonist arrives at the outpost entrance where a green canopy provides partial cover. Two Imperial personnel—an officer in green and a stormtrooper in white armor—stand guard near the weathered building facade. The floating communication array hovers overhead to the right as the character comes to a stop, facing the guards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a bright alien frontier that transitions from an open grassland into the structured environment of a sci-fi outpost. It begins with the protagonist and her small companion traversing a dirt path under a blue sky dominated by a large ringed planet and a distant, pink-beaming communication array. As the camera advances, the wide landscape narrows, shifting from lush vegetation to rugged rock outcroppings and scattered supply crates that signal the approach of the outpost. The scene then opens up to the building's entrance under a green canopy, where the floating array now hovers prominently overhead. Finally, the movement comes to a stop as the character faces two Imperial guards standing watch before the weathered facade.
